eusan_nation_strings.eusan_nation_k4_composite_armorText5: I don't think the engineers fully appreciate how dreadfully difficult to service these armor arrays when it takes a hit. So much bolting and unbolting...
eusan_nation_strings.eusan_nation_electronic_warfare_suiteTex: Reduces the chance for missiles launched by the ship to be affected by electronic counter-measures and flares by %s
Improved electronics increases missile maneuverability by %s, as well as significantly improving the guidance algorithm.
Also reduces the weapon range reduction due to superior enemy Electronic Warfare by %s.

The system processor periodically performs a background built-in-test(B-BIT), to check the status and calibration of the system. The system processor software is updated or reprogrammed as required from a memory loader verifier (MLV). The system processor uses two major software programs. The operational flight program (OFP) manages the receiver and transmitter functions, signal processing, and techniques generation. The mission data generator (MDG) contains the threat EID tables and the jamming techniques matrix for these threats.
eusan_nation_strings.eusan_nation_replika_cadreText1: Reduces supply use for maintenance, fuel use, and minimum crew required by %s
eusan_nation_strings.eusan_nation_replika_cadreText2: Increases the combat readiness recovery and repair rates by %s. The per-day supply consumption for CR recovery is increased to account for the increased recovery rate, but the total supply cost remains the same.
eusan_nation_strings.eusan_nation_replika_cadreText3: Reduces maintenance cost, fuel use, and minimum crew requirement by a further %s.
eusan_nation_strings.eusan_nation_replika_cadreText6: Yes the replika cadre onboard have been working nonstop to repair the damage. Just yesterday we found out that the wiring for the porside comparments between frame 140 and 142 portside got severed but it did not show up on the diagnotstics because rerouting systems kicked in. The LSTR units had to spend several hours crawling through the spaces to test, diagnose and repair it. They got banged up in the process so guess who has to fix them...
